secrets.description: Usernode address (ut1…) that submission fees are paid to — the Community Fund Reserve (may be a burn address). When unset, the submit-a-dapp flow is disabled. Public on-chain address.
One-time fee in tokens required to submit a dapp. A confirmed transfer must carry amount >= this value.
Hours an unpaid submission stays in 'awaiting_payment' before being swept to 'expired'. A genuine late payment is still credited.
API key for NFT.storage (IPFS pinning service for NFT image and metadata uploads). Get one at https://nft.storage
JSON-RPC endpoint for Ethereum transaction polling. Can be Infura, Alchemy, or other provider.
Ethereum contract address where NFTs are minted. Optional; if unset, NFT minting is disabled.
Base minting cost in wei (not including gas). Set to 0 for free minting.
Hours an unpaid mint submission stays in 'awaiting_payment' before being swept to 'expired'.
